turns.question: Hey, can I get your phone number before you head out?
turns.questionKo: 저기, 가시기 전에 전화번호 좀 알려주실래요?
turns.answer: Sure, it's five five five, oh one two three.

turns.question: Could you read that back to me one more time? I want to make sure I got it.
turns.questionKo: 한 번만 더 불러주실래요? 제대로 받아 적었는지 확인하고 싶어서요.
turns.answer: Of course, it's five five five, oh one two three.

turns.question: Got it. And is that the best number to reach you at during the day?
turns.questionKo: 알겠어요. 그럼 낮에 연락하기 제일 좋은 번호가 그거예요?
turns.answer: Yes, that one works fine, I keep it on me all day.
turns.answerKo: 네, 그거면 돼요, 하루 종일 가지고 다녀요.

turns.question: Do you have a work number as well, just in case?
turns.questionKo: 혹시 모르니까 회사 전화번호도 있어요?
turns.answer: Yeah, my office line is five five five, three three three three.

turns.question: Can I text you at this same number too, or should I use the other one?
turns.questionKo: 이 번호로 문자 보내도 돼요, 아니면 다른 번호로 보내야 돼요?
turns.answer: Yep, same personal number works fine for texting.
turns.answerKo: 네, 같은 개인 번호로 문자 보내시면 돼요.

turns.question: Perfect, I'll save both numbers just to be safe.
turns.questionKo: 좋아요, 혹시 모르니까 두 번호 다 저장해 둘게요.
turns.answer: Sounds good, that way you'll always be able to reach me.
turns.answerKo: 좋아요, 그러면 언제든 저한테 연락하실 수 있어요.

turns.question: Hi, I'm calling about my account -- can you confirm the number on file?
turns.questionKo: 안녕하세요, 제 계정 관련해서 전화드렸는데요, 등록된 번호 확인해 주실 수 있어요?
turns.answer: Sure, one moment -- is it five five five, four five six seven?

turns.question: Actually, no, I think I switched numbers recently.
turns.questionKo: 아니요, 사실 최근에 번호를 바꿨어요.
turns.answer: Ah, okay, do you have your new number handy for me?
turns.answerKo: 아, 그러세요, 새 번호 지금 알려주실 수 있어요?

turns.question: Yes, it's five five five, nine zero zero one now.
turns.questionKo: 네, 지금은 555에 9001이에요.
turns.answer: Got it, let me update that on your account right away.

turns.question: Is there also a way to add a second number, like for emergencies?
turns.questionKo: 혹시 비상용으로 두 번째 번호도 추가할 수 있어요?
turns.answer: Of course, do you have an emergency contact number to give me?
turns.answerKo: 그럼요, 비상 연락처 번호 알려주실 수 있어요?

turns.question: Sure, it's my sister's number, five five five, two two four four.
turns.questionKo: 네, 제 여동생 번호인데요, 555에 2244예요.
turns.answer: Perfect, I've added that as your emergency contact now.

turns.question: Great, and is there a customer service number I can call directly next time?
turns.questionKo: 좋아요, 그리고 다음에 바로 걸 수 있는 고객센터 번호도 있어요?
turns.answer: Yes, it's one eight hundred, five five five, one two three four.

turns.question: Is there also a direct line, in case that one's busy?
turns.questionKo: 혹시 그 번호가 통화 중일 때 쓸 직통 번호도 있어요?
turns.answer: Yes, you can also call five five five, seven seven zero zero directly.

turns.question: Thank you, I'll save both of those just in case.
turns.questionKo: 감사합니다, 혹시 모르니까 둘 다 저장해 둘게요.
turns.answer: You're welcome, is there anything else I can help you update today?
turns.answerKo: 천만에요, 오늘 그 외에 업데이트 도와드릴 거 더 있으세요?

turns.question: Excuse me, do you know the number for the front desk?
turns.questionKo: 저기요, 프런트 데스크 번호 아세요?
turns.answer: Yes, the front desk is five five five, four four zero zero.

turns.question: Is there also an after-hours number in case something comes up?
turns.questionKo: 혹시 무슨 일 생기면 야간 시간대에 걸 수 있는 번호도 있어요?
turns.answer: Yes, after hours, you'd call five five five, zero zero nine nine instead.

turns.question: Got it. And what number should the delivery driver call if he can't find the place?
turns.questionKo: 알겠어요. 그럼 배달 기사가 위치를 못 찾으면 어디로 전화해야 돼요?
turns.answer: Have him call five five five, seven six five four, that's the manager's line.

turns.question: Perfect. One more thing, is there an extension I need after the main number?
turns.questionKo: 좋아요. 한 가지 더요, 대표 번호 뒤에 내선 번호도 눌러야 돼요?
turns.answer: Yes, dial the main number, then extension four five six for my desk.
turns.answerKo: 네, 대표 번호 누르고 나서 제 자리 내선 456번 누르시면 돼요.

turns.question: Okay, let me repeat that back slowly to make sure I have it right.
turns.questionKo: 네, 제대로 받아 적었는지 천천히 다시 말해볼게요.
turns.answer: Sure, go ahead, take your time.

turns.question: Five five five, four four zero zero, then extension four five six?
turns.questionKo: 555, 4400, 그다음 내선 456번 맞아요?
turns.answer: That's exactly right, you've got it.

turns.question: Great, thank you so much for all the numbers.
turns.questionKo: 좋아요, 번호들 다 알려주셔서 정말 감사해요.
turns.answer: Of course, happy to help, just call anytime you need us.
